description: Online collaborative whiteboard platform empowering distributed teams to brainstorm, plan, and visualize ideas together with templates and integrations. Loved by distributed teams collaborating across time zones daily.

name: Loom
description: Video messaging tool letting users quickly record screen, voice, and face to share asynchronous updates with teammates instead of meetings.

name: Confluence
description: Atlassian's team workspace for creating, organizing, and discussing documentation, meeting notes, and project plans alongside Jira and Trello integrations. Loved by distributed teams collaborating across time zones daily.

name: Basecamp
description: All-in-one project management and team communication tool combining to-dos, messages, schedules, documents, and group chat in a simple interface. Loved by distributed teams collaborating across time zones daily.

name: Around
description: Video calling app designed for remote collaboration with floating heads, intelligent audio, and lightweight interface that keeps focus on your work.

name: freeCodeCamp
description: Nonprofit community offering thousands of free coding tutorials, certifications, and projects covering web development, data science, and machine learning. Loved by self-taught developers and engineering students worldwide.

name: MDN Web Docs
description: Mozilla's authoritative documentation for web standards including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and browser APIs, used daily by web developers worldwide. Loved by self-taught developers and engineering students worldwide.

name: Stack Overflow
description: Largest online community for programmers offering a public Q&A platform where developers ask, answer, and find technical solutions every day.

name: Udemy
description: Global online learning marketplace offering thousands of on-demand courses on programming, design, business, and personal development taught by experts. Loved by self-taught developers and engineering students worldwide.

name: Coursera
description: Online learning platform partnering with universities and companies to offer courses, professional certificates, and degrees in technology and other fields.

name: edX
description: Online learning platform founded by Harvard and MIT offering university-level courses, professional certificates, and MicroMasters across many disciplines. Loved by self-taught developers and engineering students worldwide.

name: Pluralsight
description: Technology skills platform offering expert-authored courses, skill assessments, and learning paths for software developers, IT operations, and security professionals. Loved by self-taught developers and engineering students worldwide.

name: LeetCode
description: Online platform with thousands of coding challenges helping developers prepare for technical interviews and sharpen algorithm and data structure skills.

name: Frontend Masters
description: In-depth video courses on advanced frontend, full-stack, and computer science topics taught by world-class instructors from top tech companies. Loved by self-taught developers and engineering students worldwide.

name: Codecademy
description: Interactive online learning platform offering free and paid coding lessons in many programming languages through hands-on exercises and projects. Loved by self-taught developers and engineering students worldwide.
